title: neriacanthus lehmannianus
intro: Neriacanthus lehmannianus, also known as the Costa Rican lily or the Purple Nasturtium, is a flowering plant species native to Costa Rica. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Neriacanthus lehmannianus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture to be consumed orally, or used topically as a compress to treat skin irritations and wounds.
